nasb.text: For I will take you from the nations, gather you from all the lands and bring you into your own land.

esv.text: I will take you from the nations and gather you from all the countries and bring you into your own land.

cnv.text: 我必從列國中領你們出來，從萬邦中聚集你們，把你們帶回故土。

ccb.text: 我要从列邦列国招聚你们，领你们返回故土。
